title: sumphoneo #4856
definition:
1) to agree together
 2) to agree with one in making a bargain, to make an agreement, to bargain
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to agree together
 2) to agree with one in making a bargain, to make an agreement, to bargain

    NASB:  to call out with, to be in harmony, generally to agree:
